a3f2c1d4e5b6a7f8c9d0e1f2a3b4c5d6e7f8a9b0: query GetPatient($id: String!) { patient(id: $id) { id tenantId mrn fullName ward status news2Score updatedAt } }
b4e5f6a7b8c9d0e1f2a3b4c5d6e7f8a9b0c1d2e3: query GetPatients($first: Int, $after: String) { patients(first: $first, after: $after) { id tenantId mrn fullName ward status news2Score updatedAt } }
